Operation 'createVideo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added details about expected inputs (VideoCreateRequest schema), return value (Video object), authentication requirement, and side effect (video becomes available for subtitling). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect.

data.current_description: Add a new video to Amara.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new video in Amara. Accepts video metadata including title, description, primary URL, and optional team assignment via VideoCreateRequest schema. Returns the created Video object with assigned video_id and metadata. Requires authentication. The video becomes available for subtitle management after creation.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added details about expected inputs (VideoCreateRequest schema), return value (Video object), authentication requirement, and side effect (video becomes available for subtitling). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect.

message: Operation 'deleteVideo' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_side_effects. Original description mentions authorization requirement but lacks clarity on side effects and response. Added information about permanence of deletion, what gets removed with the video, and expected HTTP response. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature and authorization constraints.

data.current_description: Delete a video. Must be part of a team where you are an admin.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a video from Amara. Requires the authenticated user to be an admin of the video's team. Deletion is irreversible and removes all associated subtitle languages, subtitles, and activity records. Returns 204 No Content on success.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions authorization requirement but lacks clarity on side effects and response. Added information about permanence of deletion, what gets removed with the video, and expected HTTP response. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature and authorization constraints.

message: Operation 'updateVideoUrl' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is parenthetical and unclear about what 'update' means. Clarified that this operation specifically designates a URL as primary, added constraint about single primary URL, authentication requirement, and return value. Helps AI agents understand the specific action and its constraints.

data.current_description: Update a video URL (set as primary).
data.description_suggestion: Sets a video URL as the primary URL for the video. Only one URL per video can be designated as primary. Requires authentication and appropriate permissions. Accepts an inline request body specifying the primary flag. Returns the updated VideoUrl object reflecting the new primary status.
data.reasoning: Original description is parenthetical and unclear about what 'update' means. Clarified that this operation specifically designates a URL as primary, added constraint about single primary URL, authentication requirement, and return value. Helps AI agents understand the specific action and its constraints.

message: Operation 'createUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal.
